Chua's Home Page Biography Publications Research Students Chua's Circuit and Chua's Equation NOEL (Prof. Chua's lab) Homepage Campus Directions Campus Map Directions to Cory and Soda Halls Schedule of Classes College of Engineering Research | Education | Awards | Students Leon O. Chua Professor, Ph.D. Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences Department Email: chua at eecs dot berkeley dot edu Phone: (510) 642-3209 FAX: (510) 845-4267 Address: University of California, Berkeley EECS Department 253 Cory Hall #1770 Berkeley, CA 94720-1770 Office: 564 Cory Hall Post doc: Dr. Jinwook Shin (510) 643-8868 Graduate Student(s): Bharathwaj "Bart" Muthuswamy Grant Administrator: Shivani Bhatia (510) 642-1012 shavanib at eecs dot berkeley dot edu Research Interests Cellular Neural/Nonlinear Networks, Nonlinear Circuits and Systems, Nonlinear Dynamics, Bifurcation and Chaos. Research Projects CNN Technology and Neural Networks Bifurcations and Chaos Nonlinear Dynamics and Complexity Theory Education BSEE, Mapua Institute of Technology, 1959 M.S., Massachusetts Institute of Technology, 1961 Ph.D., University of Illinois, Urbana-Champaign, 1964 Back to top Awards IEEE Gustav Robert Kirchhoff Award, 2005" Top 15 most cited Author in Engineering Award, 2002 (This award was chosen from the Current Contents (ISI) data base of all cited papers in the Engineering discipline (all branches of engineering) indexed from 1991 to October 31, 2001.) IEEE Neural Networks Pioneer Award, 2000 IEEE Third Millenium Medal, 2000 IEEE Circuits and Systems Society Golden Jubilee Medal, 2000 Mac Van Valkenburg Award (1995 and 1998) Professor Invite, University of Nice, 1991 Professor Invite, University of Paris, 1986 IEEE Centennial Medal,
